records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Khalid Ibn Abi Al-ala' Al-Khuffaf
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Khalid ibn Abi Al-Ala' Al-Khuffaf, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Ya'qub ibn Yazid, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Khalid ibn Abi Al-Ala' Al-Khuffaf.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن خالد بن أبي العلاء الخفّاف فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن محمّد بن أبي- عمير، عن خالد بن أبي العلاء الخفّاف‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Kahili
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Kahili, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Nasr Al-Bazanti, from Abdullah ibn Yahya Al-Kahili.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الكاهليّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن أبي نصر البزنطيّ، عن عبد اللّه ابن يحيى الكاهليّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ismail Ibn Al-Fadl
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ismail ibn Al-Fadl, I have narrated it from Jafar ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn Amir, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Abd Al-Rahman ibn Muhammad, from Al-Fadl ibn Ismail ibn Al-Fadl, from his father Ismail ibn Al-Fadl Al-Hashimi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن إسماعيل بن الفضل فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن عبد الرّحمن بن محمّد، عن الفضل بن إسماعيل بن الفضل، عن أبيه إسماعيل ابن الفضل الهاشميّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu Al-Hasan Al-Nahdi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abu Al-Hasan Al-Nahdi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali Al-Washsha', from Abu Al-Hasan Al-Nahdi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن أبي الحسن النهديّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ الوشّاء، عن أبي الحسن النهديّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Imran Al-Halabi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Imran Al-Halabi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Jafar ibn Bashir, from Hammad ibn Uthman, from Imran Al-Halabi, whose kunyah is Abu Al-Fadl.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عمران الحلبيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان عن عمران الحلبيّ، و كنيته أبو الفضل‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Harun
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Harun, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Nasr Al-Bazanti, from Abdul-Karim ibn Amr, from Al-Hasan ibn Harun.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن هارون فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن أبي نصر البزنطيّ، عن عبد الكريم بن عمرو، عن الحسن بن هارون‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ibrahim Ibn Sufyan
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ibrahim ibn Sufyan, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Ma'jilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Ibrahim ibn Sufyan.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن إبراهيم بن سفيان فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن محمّد بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن محمّد بن سنان عن إبراهيم بن سفيان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Husayn Ibn Salim
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Al-Husayn ibn Salim, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Abdullah ibn Jiblah, from Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani, from Al-Husayn ibn Salim.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن الحسين بن سالم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن عبد اللّه بن جبلة، عن‌ أبي عبد اللّه الخراسانيّ، عن الحسين بن سالم‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yusuf Al-Tatri
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Yusuf Al-Tatri, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Yusuf ibn Ibrahim Al-Tatri.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن يوسف الطاطريّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن يوسف بن إبراهيم الطاطريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Fadala Ibn Ayyub
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Fadala ibn Ayyub, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him -  from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, from Fadala ibn Ayyub. And I have also narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Al-Husayn ibn Al-Hasan ibn Aban, from Al-Husayn ibn Sa'id, from Fadala ibn Ayyub.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن فضالة بن أيّوب فقد رويته عن أبي- رحمه اللّه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن سعيد، عن فضالة بن أيّوب. و رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن الحسن بن أبان، عن الحسين بن سعيد، عن فضالة بن أيّوب‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Yahya Al-Azraq
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Yahya Al-Azraq, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him -  from Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Aban ibn Uthman, from Yahya ibn Hassan Al-Azraq.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن يحيى الأزرق فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ ابن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن أبان بن عثمان، عن يحيى ابن حسّان الأزرق‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Al-Numan
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ali ibn Al-Numan, I have narrated it from my father and Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - through Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, and Ibrahim ibn Hashim, all from Ali ibn Al-Numan.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن النعمان فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى؛ و إبراهيم بن هاشم جميعا عن عليّ بن النعمان‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ahmad Ibn Muhammad Ibn Mutahhar, Companion of Abu Muhammad, Peace Be Upon Him
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Mutahhar, the companion of Abu Muhammad, peace be upon him, I have narrated it from my father and Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them both - through Sa'd ibn Abdullah and Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, all from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Mutahhar, the companion of Abu Muhammad, peace be upon him.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن أحمد بن محمّد بن مطهّر صاحب أبي محمّد عليه السّلام فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنهما- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه؛ و عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ جميعا عن أحمد بن محمّد بن مطهّر صاحب أبي محمّد عليه السّلام‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - through Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from Abu Abdullah Al-Khurasani.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن أبي عبد اللّه الخراسانيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبي عبد اللّه الخراسانيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Harith the Seller of Carpets
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Harith the seller of carpets, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - through Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Harith the seller of carpets.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن حارث بيّاع الأنماط فقد رويته عن محمّد بن علي ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن حارث بيّاع الأنماط.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Amr Ibn sa'id Al-Sabati
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Amr ibn Sa'id Al-Sabati, I have narrated it from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Attar - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn 'Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Al-Hasan ibn 'Ali ibn Faddal, from Amr ibn Sa'id Al-Sabati.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عمرو بن سعيد السّاباطيّ فقد رويته عن أحمد بن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن الحسن بن عليّ بن فضّال‌ عن عمرو بن سعيد الساباطيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Muhammad Al-Husayni
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Husayni, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Ali Majilawayh - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from his uncle Muhammad ibn Abi Al-Qasim, from Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Kufi, from Muhammad ibn Sinan, from Ali ibn Muhammad Al-Husayni.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عليّ بن محمّد الحصينيّ فقد رويته عن محمّد بن عليّ ماجيلويه- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عمّه محمّد بن أبي القاسم، عن محمّد بن عليّ الكوفيّ، عن محمّد بن سنان، عن عليّ بن محمّد الحصينيّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Suwayd Al-qallaʾ
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Suwayd Al-Qallaʾ, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) have mercy on him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar and Al-Hasan ibn Matil, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Ali ibn Al-Nuʿman, from Suwayd Al-Qallaʾ.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن سويد القلّاء فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رحمه اللّه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار؛ و الحسن بن متّيل، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن عليّ بن النعمان، عن سويد القلّاء.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muthanna Ibn Abd Al-Salam
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muthanna ibn Abd Al-Salam, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Ṣaffar, from Muawiyah ibn Hakim, from Abdullah ibn Al-Mughirah, from Muthanna ibn Abd Al-Salam.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن مثنّى بن عبد السلام فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن معاوية بن حكيم، عن عبد اللّه بن المغيرة، عن مثنّى بن عبد السلام‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Jafar Ibn Najjiyah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Jafar ibn Najjiyah, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Hasan ibn Matil Al-Daqqaq, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khaṭṭab, from Jafar ibn Bishr Al-Bajali, from Jafar ibn Najjiyah.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن جعفر بن ناجية فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسن بن متّيل الدّقّاق، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير البجليّ، عن جعفر بن ناجية.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Dhurayh Al-Muharibi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Dhurayh Al-Muharibi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Abi Umayr, from Dhurayh ibn Yazid ibn Muhammad Al-Muharibi. And I have also narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Ṣalih ibn Razin, from Dhurayh.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن ذريح المحاربيّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن أبي عمير، عن ذريح بن يزيد بن محمّد المحاربيّ، و رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن الحسن بن محبوب عن صالح بن رزين، عن ذريح‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Kulayb Al-Asadi
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Kulayb Al-Asadi, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Muhammad ibn Khalid, from Faḍalah ibn Ayyub, from Kulayb ibn Muawiyah Al-Asadi Al-Ṣaydawi.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه، عن كليب الأسديّ فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن خالد، عن فضالة بن أيّوب، عن كليب بن معاوية الأسديّ الصيداويّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Abdullah Ibn Jafar Al-Himyari
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar ibn Jamiʿ Al-Himyari.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر بن جامع الحميريّ‌.

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Muhammad Ibn Uthman Al-Amri
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul - I have narrated it from my father, and from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan, and from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with them - from Abdullah ibn Jafar Al-Himyari, from Muhammad ibn Uthman Al-Amri - may Allah (swt) sanctify his soul.
records.arabicText: ما كان فيه عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ- قدّس اللّه روحه- فقد رويته عن أبي؛ و محمّد بن الحسن؛ و محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنهم- عن عبد اللّه بن جعفر الحميريّ، عن محمّد بن عثمان العمريّ [قدّس اللّه روحه‌].

records.chapter: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to ṣalih Ibn Uqbah
records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: And whatever is narrated from Ṣalih ibn Uqbah, I have narrated it from Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Al-Mutawakkil - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Al-Husayn Al-Saʿdaʾbadi, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid, from his father, from Muhammad ibn Sinan and Yunus ibn Abd Al-Rahman together, from Ṣalih ibn Uqbah ibn Qays ibn Saman ibn Abi Rabihah, the freed slave of the Messenger of Allah (swt), peace and blessings be upon him and his family.
records.arabicText: و ما كان فيه عن صالح بن عقبة فقد رويته عن محمّد بن موسى بن المتوكّل- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن الحسين السعدآباديّ، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن خالد، عن أبيه، عن محمّد بن سنان؛ و يونس بن عبد الرّحمن جميعا عن صالح بن عقبة بن قيس بن سمعان بن أبي ربيحة مولى رسول اللّه صلّى اللّه عليه و آله‌.
